finding: The v1 packet recorded the pre-governance commit 8af92a49 as exact_start_head, but PKR-A1 began after the governed tree and packet commit 8504cafb.
cause: The v1 packet was drafted before its own governance commit and did not refresh exact_start_head after that commit.
impact: Validator rejected exact-head provenance while accepting functional gates.
correction: Supersede only dispatch provenance with worker-packets/pkr-a1-exec-api.v2.json; product scope, target contract, thresholds, and authority are unchanged.
